name_en: LO℮w℮🌟New Arrival Small Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Bag Featuring a unique geometric line outline for a rectangular shape. Soft lightweight Nappa leather adds a casual lazy style. Shoulder, crossbody or handbag carry
name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟New Arrival Small Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Bag Featuring a unique geometric line outline for a rectangular shape. Soft lightweight Nappa leather adds a casual lazy style. Shoulder, crossbody or handbag carry
Detachable adjustable strap with rotating buckle*Zip closure, hinged zipper pull One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket*Detachable LOE**WE gold or silver foil label, featuring hidden pocket and balloon dice*Rectangular metal feet Nappa leather lining Anagram embossing, LOE**WE engraved on the internal plaque.
size:062502
model:24*10.5*16.5cm
F:850(Full set)
